title: astragalus deterior
intro: Astragalus deterior, also known as Astragalus membranaceus, is a traditional Chinese medicinal plant that belongs to the legume family. It is valued for its adaptogenic properties, which help the body to resist stress, fatigue, and disease. The plant is rich in saponins, flavonoids, and polysaccharides, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. Astragalus deterior can be prepared into various herbal forms, including capsules, tablets, teas, and decoctions, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including bronchitis, fatigue, and immune system disorders.
